steps.title: Focus on both time periods
steps.content: The student's claim is that the archive features older and newer artifacts. A strong answer must include evidence from both dates, not just describe the archive or one artifact.

steps.title: Reject incomplete evidence
steps.content: Choice A gives only the older rubber stamp. Choice B names artifact categories without dates. Choice C hints that some items are not from the 1800s but gives no concrete newer example.

steps.title: Use both dated artifacts
steps.content: The archive's rubber stamp from the 1800s and cane trunk basket from 2019 provide direct evidence that it includes both older and newer cultural artifacts. The answer is D.
